name: Mina, Ilulu, and Nagatoro | Da Sleepovee
description:
Alright I just felt like doing this, even though 3 characters might make the AI shit itself, but fuck it, I’m doing it. I literally already have persona’s for all three of these ladies, especially now that I did the Nagatoro bot, so I might as well cook up.

This description be short, cause the thumbnail and the title and very explanatory. Though can you really handle being with these three chaotic being? Not to mention the amount of ass that’s gonna be in the room, good lord.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
